_doc: Curated popular/important projects with role-defining heuristics and popularity hints. 'role_conventions' tell extractors how each project records roles; 'popularity.min_stars_override' keeps high-signal-but-small standards projects past the popularity filter. The tool may append observed popularity to this structure with --save-registry.

python/peps.notes: Python Enhancement Proposals; RST files pep-NNNN.rst with ':Author:' headers.

numpy/numpy.notes: NEPs under doc/neps (RST); authoritative roles on numpy.org.

pytorch/pytorch.notes: Module maintainers listed on the Persons of Interest page; the repo also has a CODEOWNERS.

scientific-python/specs.notes: Scientific Python SPECs; Markdown with YAML front-matter 'author:'.

jupyter/enhancement-proposals.notes: Jupyter Enhancement Proposals (JEPs); Markdown with YAML front-matter.

kubernetes/kubernetes.notes: Uses Kubernetes OWNERS (YAML) files with approvers/reviewers.
